dialogue.A: Hey, did you try that new ramen place?
dialogue.B: Oh my god, YES! The tonkotsu broth was bussin'! 🔥
dialogue.A: I knew it! Everyone's been talking about it.
dialogue.B: Trust me, just go. The noodles are straight bussin' no cap.

definition: 俚语，用来形容某物非常好、尤其指食物特别好吃。源自非裔美国人白话英语(AAVE)，后因TikTok而广泛流行。
examples: This mac and cheese is absolutely bussin'! (这芝士通心粉太好吃了！)
We found a new restaurant and the food was bussin'. (我们发现了一家新店，食物超棒。)
Your cooking is bussin'—don't change a thing. (你做饭太好吃了，别换做法。)
collocation: bussin' no cap (真的好吃，不夸张)
